Configuration.name: OrionLibrary
Configuration.Description: This is the global OrionQL macro library

entry.value: :format(${:toXml}${attributes:select( like( "value", "^<\\?xml" ) ):map(:format(${key} = ${value})):join(),})
Replacement for :toXml if attributes can contain XML
Format input intelligently depending on type
Abbreviate words and camelCase words to 3 characters

:format(${:switch(
="
 "," ")}${:replace(
+, $0 )})
Depending on the input being single- or multiline, prepends it with a space or a newline and indents it by two spaces
Limit line length to 16 characters
:html(${$limit16$})
Limit line length to 16 characters and add HTML tooltip
Limit line length to 40 characters
:html(${$limit40$})
Limit line length to 40 characters and add HTML tooltip
Limit line length to 60 characters
:html(${$limit60$})
Limit line length to 60 characters and add HTML tooltip
Limit line length to 0 characters
:html(${$limit100$})
Limit line length to 100 characters and add HTML tooltip
Wrap lines after 16 characters
Wrap lines after 40 characters
Wrap lines after 60 characters
Wrap lines after 100 characters
Wrap lines after 16 characters on next word boundary
Wrap lines after 40 characters on next word boundary
Wrap lines after 60 characters on next word boundary
Wrap lines after 100 characters on next word boundary
:format(${%yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss})
Format timestamp as yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss
Format timestamp as yyyy-MM-dd
Format timestamp as yyyy-MM
Format timestamp as yyyy
Format timestamp as HH:mm:ss
Format timestamp as HH:mm
Format timestamp as HH
Formats seconds given as input as days:hours:minutes:seconds
Formats object using the standard formatting template $augmentedNameFormat$
Returns the input number with all but the leading digit zeroed out
Quoted HEX String encoding of red color
Quoted HEX String encoding of green color
Quoted HEX String encoding of yellow color
Quoted HEX String encoding of orange color
Quoted HEX String encoding of blue color
Quoted HEX String encoding of magenta color
Quoted HEX String encoding of grey color
Returns a color encoding a status enum value as green, red etc.
Returns a color encoding an operation enum value as green, red etc.
Returns a color encoding an audit event action as green, red etc.
Formats status as colored text
Returns a color encoding a log level
Formats log level as colored text
Transforms numeric input into a color to highlight a duration in seconds from green over yellow (5 min) to red (2 h)
Formats seconds as colored duration using the scale of $toDurationColor$
Transforms numeric input into a color to highlight a percentage value from red (0) over yellow (50) to green (100)
:switch(\ ^0[.0]*$="color: #ef0000; font-weight: bold;",\ ^100[.0]*$="color: #00bf00; font-weight: bold;",\ :heat(#ef0000=0,#f0e800=98,#00bf00=2)\ )
Transforms numeric input into a color to highlight a success rate from green (100) over yellow (98) to red (0), additionally styling 0 and 100 in boldface
Convert a list into its size with the contents as popup
Convert a mapping of numbers into their sum with the details as popup
Transforms a mapping of status strings to counts into their sum, color styled by the percentage of the 'Success' counts, with the details as popup
Convert a two-level mapping of numbers into their sum with the details grid as popup
${displayName} (${name|value})
Standard formatting template for "displayName (name|value)"
Transforms a mapping of status strings to counts into the percentage of the 'Success' counts
Convert a two‑level mapping representing a matrix to its transposed form by swapping the outer (row) and inner (column) key levels
:flatten(^?*,eq( "^?.key", null )):map(key):join(#)
For an entry in a multi‑level mapping, compute a unique identifier by concatenating the entry’s key with its ancestor keys up to the root
Computes an indentation string by repeating a double‑space for each hierarchy level in the current object's parent chain
For an entry in a two‑level mapping representing a matrix (outer keys = rows, inner keys = columns), return the mapping that represents the matrix
For an entry in a two‑level mapping representing a matrix (outer keys = rows, inner keys = columns), return the mapping that represents the row which contains the cell represented by the entry
For an entry in a two‑level mapping representing a matrix (outer keys = rows, inner keys = columns), return the mapping that represents the column which contains the cell represented by the entry
Create a link to the Certification given as input

:link(\ /identityiq/certification/certification.jsf#/certification/${id},\ ${name},\ ${parent:html(Parent: ${$linkToCertification$}),}\ ${:Certification(>{id,name}parent.id == $"id"):html(${@.parent:format(\n),}Children: ${:map($linkToCertification$):join(\n )}),}\ )
Create a link to the Certification given as input, including a tooltip with its parent/child relationships (if any)
Create a link to the Identity given as input
Create a link to the IdentityRequest given as input
:link(/identityiq/workitem/commonWorkItem.jsf#/commonWorkItem/${id},${expiration|name|type},${description,}${owner:format(\nOwner: $augmentedNameFormat$),})
Create a link to the WorkItem given as input
Split a CSV string into a list
Truncate the last digit of a number to 0 or 5

:match(\ Access is denied|\ There is no such object on the server|\ The object already exists|\ Native Identity should not be null or empty|\ ATT_OR_VALUE_EXISTS|\ CPL request error: USR_M08 there are still open entries in Aboplan|\ User services cannot be added in SWS\ )|\ "Other"
Extracts a known error string from a message given as input
Creates a summary of an account request
items\ :map(:format(\ [${application}] ${operation} ${nativeIdentity,} ${name,} ${value,}${comments:format(\n ${:join(\n )}),}\ ))\ :join
Creates a summary of the items in an approval set
Creates a summary of an attribute request

:cache(_bundleDependenciesRaw,\ :union(\ :Bundle(>{name,inheritance.name}inheritance.name.notNull() && type != "EntitlementRole"),\ :Bundle(>{name,requirements.name}requirements.name.notNull())\ )\ :group(>inheritance\.name|requirements\.name,name)\ )\ :cache(_bundleDependenciesFlattened,\ :index(key,\ :flatten(\ value#\ :cache(_bundleDependenciesRaw):get(@)*\ )\ :count\ :map(key)\ )\ )
Iterate over all entitlements granted by a role. Access data as follows: - @ = value - ^.property = attribute - ^.^.application.name = application name
[${^.^.application.name}/${^.property}] ${}
Standard formatting template for entitlements when reading them from $bundle.iterateEntitlements$

:link(#,\ ${targetDisplayName} (${targetName})\, ${items:size} items,\ ${items:map(:switch(type,\ PolicyViolation=:format(${type}: ${policyViolation.constraintName} (${policyViolation.policyName})),\ :format(${type}: ${targetDisplayName} (${targetName}))\ )):sort:join}\ )
Creates a summary of a certification entity as HTML
Creates a summary of a certification as HTML

:cache(_entitlementRolesIndex-${application.name},\ :flatten(\ :Profile(>application.name == $"application.name")#\ constraints#\ value\ )\ :group(^.property#,^.^.bundle.name)\ )\ :get(attribute|name#value)\ :flatten(#$bundle.dependencies$:get(@))\ :count\ :map(key)
For a ManagedAttribute or IdentityEntitlement, return the list of names of all granting roles (excluding entitlement roles)
[${application.name}/${attribute|name}] ${value}
Standard formatting template for ManagedAttribute and IdentityEntitlement

items:map(:format(\ [${application}] \ ${operation} \ ${name,} \ ${value,}${displayableValue:format(/${}),}\ ${endDate:format( [end=${%yyyy-MM-dd}]),}\ ${expansionInfo:format(: ${}),} \ (Approval ${approvalState,Open}, Provisioning ${provisioningState})\ ))\ :join
Creates a summary of the items in an identity request
Creates a summary of a provisioning plan

created=:link(#,${created},${:toXml}) modified retryCount name operation source requester=request.arguments.(requester|createEventMap:map(key):join(/)) reference=accessRequestId:IdentityRequest.$linkToIdentityRequest$|certificationId:Certification.$linkToCertification$ identity=identityName status=status.$toColoredStatus$ request=:html(\ ${request.$accountRequest.summary$}\n\ ${filtered:link(#,Filtered,${$accountRequest.summary$},red),}\ ) request.result.errors:join planResult.errors:join
Standard column set to display provisioning transactions
Standard column set to display access requests
:format(\ ${:construct(allowSelf,allowOther,allowBulk):select( eq( "value", true ) ):format((${:map(key):join(, )})),}\ ${options:select(eq( "value", "true" )):map(key):join(\n ):format(\n ${}),}\ )
Creates a summary of the QuickLink's option flags
Walk down the execution tree of a workflow case with its subworkflows, iterating over all currently executing steps (^ is the step's workflow case, ^.workflow is the step's workflow)

:html(\ ${name} (${:WorkItem(?workflowCase.id == $"id"),-/-} work items)\n\ ${\ $workflowCase.iterateExecutionTree$\ :map(:html( \ ${$computeHierarchyIndent$}\ ${^.workflow.name}: \ ${name} \ (${\ subProcess.name|\ workItemId:WorkItem.$linkToWorkItem$|\ approval:flatten(children*):map(:html(${\ workItemId:WorkItem.$linkToWorkItem$|\ description|\ name|\ mode|\ workItemType\ })):join(|)\ })\ ))\ :join\ }\ )
Creates a summary of a workflow case's state as HTML
Creates a text representation of a WorkflowSummary

Renders a link to a Generic Query that displays the input object's XML. If the input object does not provide a class attribute, supply it like this: :construct(id=id,class="WorkflowCase"), and to submit a custom text to be used for the link instead of the ID, supply it in the :construct() as attribute text. A tooltip can be supplied as attribute tooltip.
